name: coding-agent-free
description: Interactive AI coding agent using free OpenRouter models with real tool calling

scripts.build:binary: npm run build && pkg dist/agent.js --targets node18-win-x64,node18-linux-x64,node18-macos-x64 --output coding-agent
scripts.build:binary:win: npm run build && pkg dist/agent.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output coding-agent.exe
scripts.build:binary:web: npm run build && pkg dist/server.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output coding-agent-web.exe
scripts.test:unit: npm run build && cross-env NO_COLOR=1 node --test --test-concurrency=1 --test-timeout=30000 dist/__tests__/autoRouter.test.js dist/__tests__/CodingAgent.test.js dist/__tests__/ConversationState.test.js dist/__tests__/comprehensive.test.js dist/__tests__/detectLocalModel.test.js dist/__tests__/loadProjectContext.test.js dist/__tests__/fileManager.test.js dist/__tests__/agent.test.js dist/__tests__/server.test.js dist/__tests__/mcp.test.js dist/__tests__/lsp.test.js dist/__tests__/persistence.test.js dist/__tests__/governance.test.js dist/__tests__/toolRegistry.test.js dist/__tests__/models.test.js dist/__tests__/planner.test.js dist/__tests__/projectManager.test.js dist/__tests__/sessionProjectPlan.test.js dist/__tests__/smoke.test.js
